about_p1: is a leading wholesale supplier of spare parts to the Uzbek market, mainly for locally produced GM Uzbekistan vehicles, as well as motor oils and coolants. Our priorities include market research, expanding the number of high-quality manufacturers, quality control, and development of the regional distribution network.
about_p2: Records Trading Group regularly conducts meetings, seminars and trainings that contribute to the development of the company. Our office has showroom stands of our key partners.
about_p3: We are official distributors in the Republic of Uzbekistan of major manufacturers of auto parts, lubricants and coolants.
logistic_text: The company operates logistics centers in major cities of Uzbekistan to improve distribution efficiency. The main logistics hub with its own customs terminal is conveniently located near Tashkent and the intercity highway. The center provides fast and comfortable service for wholesale clients. Transparent pricing and fast delivery create strong customer loyalty.
contact_sub: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it.
message_sent_sub: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
лучшая: the best brand for the wholesale supply and retail sale of spare parts in the territory of the Republic of Uzbekistan, primarily for trucks, trailers, commercial transport, and buses.
Ассортимент: The Euro Truck Part Center company's assortment exceeds 20,000 items and includes the full range of parts for domestic and European trucks, special equipment, and Korean-made vehicles.
Единственный: The unique project allows for the concentration of more than 15,000 spare parts and components for Russian, European, and Korean trucks in one location. The modern WMS system and highly qualified employees ensure the prompt and high-quality completion of orders of any complexity and volume.
активно: The company actively develops its range in the areas of passenger, commercial, and freight transport, buses, utility equipment, special equipment, as well as autochemicals and fuel and lubricants, various automotive goods, and tools. Euro Truck Part Center strives not to stop at what has been achieved and is always looking for new ways to develop on the path to achieving its priority task - comprehensively supplying partners with the entire necessary range of spare parts, goods, and services that enhance the quality of the automotive industry's work.
